preconditions: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Home page should load successfully before executing test steps

testCases.title: Verify all approved navigation buttons and action buttons are visible on the home page
steps: Observe the home page UI without interacting with any control
Verify the visibility of person button, back button, notification button, home button, customer signup button, clean survey button, and site survey button
testCases.expectedResult: All approved buttons and links are displayed on the home page, visually aligned without overlap or truncation, and each control is enabled and available for interaction.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the person button navigates the user to the login page with expected URL
testCases.expectedResult: The application redirects the user to the login page and the browser URL changes to http://localhost/washtabui/login?data=undefined with the login page loaded successfully.

testCases.title: Verify customer signup button opens the customer-search page
testCases.expectedResult: The application redirects the user from the home page to the customer-search page and the destination page loads without UI errors or blank content.

testCases.title: Verify clean survey button opens the vehicle-survey page
testCases.expectedResult: The application redirects the user from the home page to the vehicle-survey page and the page content loads successfully without broken UI elements.

testCases.title: Verify site survey button opens the survey page
testCases.expectedResult: The application redirects the user from the home page to the survey page and the survey page is displayed successfully.

testCases.title: Verify home button remains functional when clicked from the home page
steps: Locate and click the home button
testCases.expectedResult: The application remains on the home page after clicking the home button and the URL continues to display the home page address without rendering issues or unexpected redirects.

testCases.title: Verify notification button accepts click interaction without application failure
testCases.expectedResult: The notification button responds to the click action without browser errors, application crashes, frozen UI state, or page corruption, and the application remains responsive.

testCases.title: Verify back button responds to user interaction on the home page
testCases.expectedResult: The back button accepts the click action without displaying browser errors, broken layouts, or unresponsive UI behavior.

testCases.title: Verify home page remains usable after browser back navigation
steps: Use browser back navigation to return to the home page
testCases.expectedResult: The browser returns to the home page successfully and all approved controls are visible, enabled, and responsive after navigation back to the page.

testCases.title: Verify refreshing the home page preserves approved controls and layout
testCases.expectedResult: The home page reloads successfully after refresh and all approved controls remain visible, correctly aligned, and interactive without missing UI components.

testCases.title: Verify user remains on the home page when no action is performed
steps: Do not click any navigation or action button
Observe the page state for several seconds
testCases.expectedResult: The application remains on the home page without automatic redirects, unexpected navigation, forced refresh, or disappearing UI controls.

testCases.title: Verify approved controls remain clickable after page refresh
steps: Click the person button after the page reload completes
testCases.expectedResult: After refreshing the home page, the person button remains interactive and clicking it redirects the user to http://localhost/washtabui/login?data=undefined without delay or UI failure.
